headline: Is AppLovin's 19% Year-to-Date Pullback a Buying Opportunity?
summary: APP's 19% year-to-date pullback comes despite strong AI-driven growth and expanding margins, though its premium valuation tempers upside.

headline: AppLovin Corporation (APP) Stock Down Heavily Since Jim Cramer Was “Comfortable” Recommending It
summary: We recently published Jim Cramer’s Biggest Losers: 10 Stocks That Just Didn’t Work Out. AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) is a technology company that enables customers to run digital advertisements. Its shares are up by 52% over the past year and are down by 14.8% […]

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on AppLovin, Raises Price Target to $575
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Alec Brondolo   maintains AppLovin (NASDAQ:APP) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $571 to $575.
